feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: My professional website, displaying my projects and other work in statistics and data science.

entry.title: First Blog Post
entry.content:
Hello and welcome to my blog page! This will just be a short first post detailing some of the things you can expect to see on this section of my website.

While I have a separate “Projects” page here to display my more involved statistics/data science work, I plan to use this space for writings on various other topics that interest me, such as math, history, and sports (especially analytics).

I look forward to providing more content in the future, thanks for visiting my site, and I hope you stick around to hear more from me very shortly!
entry.summary: An introductory post to explain my plans for this blog
